title: lyrocarpa linearifolia
intro: Lyrocarpa linearifolia, also known as the New Zealand tree daisy or kawakawa relative, is a plant species native to the coastal regions of New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Lyrocarpa linearifolia include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
